caption: A man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in what appears to be a classroom or presentation setting. He is wearing a lanyard with an ID badge around his neck. Initially, he gestures with his left hand while speaking, possibly explaining something. As the sequence progresses, he brings both hands together in front of him, clasping them as if emphasizing a point or preparing to make another gesture. The background includes a whiteboard and part of a chair, suggesting an educational or professional environment. His posture and hand movements indicate that he is actively engaged in delivering information or instructions.
